title: Smoky Spicy Brazilian Pea Crumble
description: A quick-fix sour and crunchy dish featuring smoky flavors and a blend of smooth peas with hints of spices in a plant-based friendly recipe.

ingredients.name: 1 can (400g) cannellini beans, rinsed and drained

instructions: In a large saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in smoked paprika, cumin, and chili powder. Cook for an additional minute, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Add cannellini beans and coconut milk. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low. Simmer for 10 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix cornstarch with water until smooth. Stir into the saucepan and cook for an additional minute until thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve warm as a snack or side dish.
Optional: garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
